author: alice
content: Got 'ConnectionRefused' on port 5432 from a Python script. Postgres should be running. What could cause this?

author: bob
content: pg_isready first. Then check if your .env has DATABASE_URL pointing at a different port.

author: alice
content: Yep, .env had 5433. Fixed. Thanks.

author: alice
content: Btw, anyone else seen connection drops on the staging DB the last hour? Random reconnects every few minutes.

author: bob
content: Yes — got an alert at 21:30. Staging RDS instance is at 95% CPU.

author: bob
content: Investigating now.

author: alice
content: Ah, that explains it. Anything I can do to help?

author: bob
content: Could you look at the recent migration? I think the new index is causing slow queries.

author: alice
content: On it. Pulling the migration log...

author: alice
alice
content: Running `ANALYZE users` now.

author: bob
content: Nice catch 🎯

author: bob
content: CPU dropped to 30%. Looks resolved.

author: alice
content: Confirmed. Closing the incident.

author: bob
content: Morning. Time for the postmortem?

author: alice
content: Yeah, can do at 10am.

author: bob
content: Booked the room. Will share notes after.

author: alice
content: Postmortem doc is up: /shared/postmortems/2026-05-06.md

author: bob
content: Read it. Three action items?

author: alice
content:
Yep:
1. Automated ANALYZE after every migration that touches indexes
2. Alert on sustained CPU > 80% for 5 min
3. Runbook update for this scenario

author: bob
content: I'll take the runbook. You take ANALYZE automation?

author: alice
content: Deal 🤝

author: alice
content: Pushed the ANALYZE automation to staging. PR #4521.

author: bob
content: Reviewing.

author: bob
content: Looks good overall. One question: what about partial migrations? If the migration fails halfway, do we still try to ANALYZE?

author: alice
content: Good point. Let me add a check — only run ANALYZE if the migration completed successfully.

author: alice
content: Updated. Also added tests for the partial-migration case.

author: bob
content: LGTM ✅ approved

author: alice
content: Thanks! Merging now.
